recommendations.title: Unbeatable
recommendations.overview: Fai, once a world champion in boxing, escapes to Macau from the loan sharks and unexpectedly encounters Qi, a young chap who is determined to win a boxing match. Fai becomes Qi's mentor and rediscovers his passion to fight not only in the ring but fo

recommendations.title: Throw Down
recommendations.overview: A former Judo champion is given the chance to redeem himself after he befriends a competitor and an aspiring singer.

recommendations.title: La Jetée
recommendations.overview: A man confronts his past during an experiment that attempts to find a solution to the problems of a post-apocalyptic world caused by a world war.

recommendations.title: Fulltime Killer
recommendations.overview: Professional assassin O has resided in an isolated world of killing and loneliness. But his life begins to change once he meets the innocent Chin; hired to clean O's apartment. However, soon the flamboyent and reckless Tok enters Chin's life with a m

recommendations.title: Mad Detective
recommendations.overview: Bun, a schizophrenic, former police inspector comes out of retirement to help a rookie detective solve a complex murder case involving a missing colleague and a suspected policeman suffering from a multiple personality disorder.

recommendations.title: Initial D
recommendations.overview: After winning his first competition, Takumi focuses his attention on drift racing, a sport he has unknowingly perfected while delivering tofu in his father's Toyota AE86.
recommendations.director: Alan Mak Siu-Fai, Andrew Lau Wai-Keung

recommendations.title: Turbo Kid
recommendations.overview: In a post-apocalyptic wasteland, an orphaned teen must battle a ruthless warlord to save the girl of his dreams.
recommendations.director: François Simard, Anouk Whissell, Yoann-Karl Whissell

recommendations.title: Infernal Affairs III
recommendations.overview: Triad gangster turned corrupt cop Lau Kin-ming goes to dangerous lengths to avoid detection.
recommendations.director: Alan Mak Siu-Fai, Andrew Lau Wai-Keung

recommendations.title: Overheard
recommendations.overview: The story revolves around three members of a police surveillance squad conducting an investigation into a financial investment group involved in criminal fraud. The focus of the plot, however, is actually on the three officers themselves who stumble
recommendations.director: Felix Chong Man-Keung, Alan Mak Siu-Fai

recommendations.title: Infernal Affairs II
recommendations.overview: In this prequel to the original, a bloody power struggle among the Triads coincides with the 1997 handover of Hong Kong, setting up the events of the first film.
recommendations.director: Alan Mak Siu-Fai, Andrew Lau Wai-Keung
